outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran says it has responded to US proposal for ending war
outlets.summary: CNN reports Iran sent response to US 14-point proposal via Pakistani mediators. Iran seeks to end war on all fronts including Lebanon. Also covers UAE/Kuwait/Qatar drone attacks and Israel killing 39 in Lebanon.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Iran ceasefire tested as cargo ship catches fire and Kuwait reports drone attack
outlets.summary: WaPo reports coordinated drone attacks on UAE, Kuwait, and Qatar strain the ceasefire. Cargo ship hit 23nm off Doha. IRGC warns US against further attacks on ships.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Fallout from the Iran war may include a NATO where the U.S. is no longer its leader
outlets.summary: NPR analysis: Iran war causing fundamental rethinking of NATO. European leaders considering 'European NATO' without US leadership. Pentagon ordered withdrawal of 5,000 troops from Germany. US-Germany rift deepening.

outlets.name: CNN Analysis
outlets.headline: Trump is not getting what he initially wanted from the Iran war
outlets.summary: CNN analysis: Trump abandoned initial demands — unconditional surrender, regime change, permanent nuclear 'never' — all dropped. 14-point MOU is 'quite notably not where Trump set the bar two short months ago.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Ceasefire appears to hold after US strikes Iranian oil tankers
outlets.summary: Fox frames US strikes on Iranian tankers and ongoing deal negotiations as Trump's peace-through-strength approach working. Reports Rubio-Witkoff meeting with Qatari PM in Miami. Highlights US could 'move quickly to cripple Iran's military if talks fail.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US could move quickly to cripple Iran's military if talks fail
outlets.summary: Fox military analysis: Pentagon has contingency plans to intensify strikes if Iran rejects deal. Trump expects Iran response 'tonight.' Oil stable near $101. Gas $4.52.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran sends to Pakistan response to US proposal to end war
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera reports Iran sent response to US 14-point proposal via Pakistani mediators. Iran seeks to end war on all fronts including Lebanon and ensure Hormuz shipping security. No immediate White House response.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US-Iran ceasefire under strain as Gulf states report drone attacks
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers coordinated Iranian drone attacks on UAE, Kuwait, and Qatar. Ceasefire under strain. Qatari LNG tanker Al Kharaitiyat crosses Hormuz — first since war. IRGC warns US against ship attacks.

outlets.name: Reuters/BBC
outlets.headline: Iran ceasefire tested as cargo ship catches fire off Qatar
outlets.summary: International wire coverage of drone attack on cargo ship near Qatar and coordinated Gulf attacks. IRGC warns sanctions-enforcing nations will 'face problems' in Hormuz.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Adviser to Iran supreme leader compares control of Hormuz to 'atomic bomb'
outlets.summary: ToI covers Mokhber's 'atomic bomb' rhetoric on Hormuz, Vance-Qatari PM meeting, Rubio expecting Iran response, and S&P 500 hitting new ATH at 7,399.

outlets.name: Israel Hayom
outlets.headline: Khamenei meets Iran's military chiefs as Gulf states report drone incursions
outlets.summary: Israel Hayom covers Mojtaba Khamenei meeting military chief Abdollahi with 'guiding measures.' UAE/Kuwait/Qatar drone attacks. Israel kills 39 in Lebanon.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu on CBS: Iran war 'not over' until uranium removed
outlets.summary: JPost covers Netanyahu's CBS 60 Minutes interview demanding physical removal of 970 lbs of enriched uranium. 'You go in, and you take it out.' Rejects emerging US-Iran deal framework.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian: 'We will never bow our heads before the enemy'
outlets.summary: Iran International covers Pezeshkian's statement as Iran sends response to US proposal. President balances nationalist rhetoric with willingness to negotiate. Reports on internal power struggle between reform and hardline factions.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Top general tells Leader Iranian Armed Forces ready crush any aggression
outlets.summary: Press TV covers Mojtaba Khamenei meeting Armed Forces chief Ali Abdollahi. Abdollahi vows 'swift, severe, and decisive' response to any enemy action. Khamenei issues 'guiding measures' for military operations.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran sends response to US ceasefire proposal via Pakistan
outlets.summary: IRNA via Al Jazeera reports Iran's response focuses on ending war on all fronts including Lebanon, shipping security, and rejection of US 'deadlines or ultimatums.' FM spokesman Baghaei: Iran won't respond to ultimatums.
